comment: Default-FAIL verification contract. Every check starts at passes=false. A check may be flipped to true only after its verification command ran and the evidence file (log, report, or screenshot path relative to the repository root) was inspected. check-contract.(sh|ps1) refuses Done while any required check fails. Checks with required:false that have passes=false must carry a non-empty waiver_reason explaining why the check does not apply.

checks.waiver_reason: Non-code stack (stack: docs per Global Constraints): all task files are Markdown, JSON Schema, or Pester test scripts -- no linter is configured for this repository's Markdown/JSON content.
Non-code stack (stack: docs): no compiled or statically-typed language is used by this task's files; there is no typechecker to run.
No integration surface: domain-sync is a Markdown skill consumed by agent judgment, not a service with an integration boundary; covered instead by the acceptance-tests and regression checks below.
Non-code stack (stack: docs): Markdown skills, JSON Schema, and Pester test scripts are shipped as source with no build/compile step.
No startable process: domain-sync and the reviewer-agent checks are agent-invoked Markdown instructions, not a dev server, Docker container, or CLI binary that can be started and smoke-tested.
Not a refactor/bugfix task with a baseline-behavior.md; differential-test-policy.md does not apply to this net-new additive feature task.
No user-facing UI surface: this task touches only internal skill/agent Markdown definitions and Pester tests, nothing rendered to an end user.
No design-system/ directory involvement and no UI-layer files touched by this task.
